name: nepal-football
description: Nepali Europapokal 2026 Manager - serverless event management SPA

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @nepal-football/backend && npm run test -w @nepal-football/frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy -w @nepal-football/infra
